### useConstant()

The `useConstant` function is a custom React Hook that allows you to store a constant value that persists for the lifetime of the component. This is useful when you need a constant value that does not change across re-renders, but is not part of the component's state or props.

```typescript
export declare function useConstant<T>(fn: () => T): T;
```

#### useConstant的参数


<SiteTableHighlight columns="3" type="1" />

|  参数 | 类型 | 描述 |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  fn | () =&gt; T |  |

<b>返回值:</b>

T
